title: Silky Thai Cucumber Salad
description: A light, glassy Thai cucumber salad with creamy Greek yogurt, zesty lime, and a hint of chili, finished with toasted peanut crunch.
instructions: Thinly slice cucumber into matchsticks with a mandoline or knife.
Julienne the carrot into fine ribbons.
In a bowl, combine Greek yogurt, lime juice, fish sauce, maple syrup, and chili flakes; whisk until smooth.
Toss cucumber and carrot ribbons into the yogurt dressing, coating evenly.
Fold in chopped cilantro and mint, reserving a handful for garnish.
Transfer the salad to a serving dish and sprinkle the crushed peanuts on top.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve immediately with a garnish of extra cilantro and mint, and a light drizzle of lime if desired.
